store.live_theme: CROW & CROWN — Industrial Museum Luxury Draft

products.pricing_rule: Use exact Printful cost + shipping-aware margin; retail must not undercut the digital suite positioning.
products.catalog_resolution: Codex must query current Printful catalog and exact variant IDs; do not hardcode

products.pricing_rule: Use exact Printful cost + shipping-aware margin; publish only if print quality and dimensions match the brand standard.

storefront_rules: Hero product should be The Icon Edit — Complete Exhibition Archive, not a generic bundle grid.
Product cards should use editorial naming and restrained copy, not discount-bundle language.
Show fewer products per section with more whitespace and stronger hierarchy.
Use the words suite, archive, atelier, gallery, edition, and printed for you where accurate.
Avoid words like cheap, basic, mega, starter, bundle dump, huge pack, or everything included in the first visible text.
qa_gates: No active digital product without attached ZIP and test download
No active Printful product without clean sync status, print-area fit, mockups, shipping profile, and checkout shipping test
No live theme publication without explicit review
No artwork redesign or color drift
No commodity/cheap product naming on the live storefront
